focus: minimal fix design for stale gate and duplicate symbol ids

graphEvents.label: Pass {skipFreshFiles: effectiveIncremental} from code graph scan handler
Dedupe generated symbol ids in capturesToNodes preserving first-seen node
Supplement scan payload with fullScanRequested and effectiveIncremental

summary: indexFiles should default skipFreshFiles to true so ensure-ready and existing tests retain selective refresh behavior
Non-incremental cleanup treats indexFiles results as the complete desired graph, so stale-only results delete fresh tracked paths
Add IndexFilesOptions.skipFreshFiles and call indexFiles(config, { skipFreshFiles: effectiveIncremental }) from the scan handler
Use Option A: dedupe generated symbol ids in capturesToNodes, preserving first-seen line/signature and stable symbol ids
Do not append line numbers to duplicate symbol ids because it makes graph identity unstable across edits
Do not attempt parser-layer scope surgery in the minimal fix because it touches traversal semantics, regex parity, and edge extraction
Supplement, rather than rename, fullReindexTriggered with fullScanRequested and effectiveIncremental in the scan response payload
